psalm-115-1.verse:
Not to us, O Lord, not to us,
  But to Your name give glory
  Because of Your lovingkindness, because of Your truth.
psalm-115-1.prayer: Lord, not to me, but to Your name give glory. Let my life honor Your lovingkindness, truth, and faithfulness.

psalm-115-2.verse:
Why should the nations say,
  “Where, now, is their God?”
psalm-115-2.prayer: Father, when others question Your presence or power, help me trust that You are near, active, and sovereign.

psalm-115-3.verse:
But our God is in the heavens;
  He does whatever He pleases.
psalm-115-3.prayer: Lord, You are in the heavens and You do whatever pleases You. Help me rest in Your authority and wisdom.

psalm-115-4.verse:
Their idols are silver and gold,
  The work of man’s hands.
psalm-115-4.prayer: Father, keep my heart from trusting in anything lifeless, empty, or made by human hands.

psalm-115-5.verse:
They have mouths, but they cannot speak;
  They have eyes, but they cannot see;
psalm-115-5.prayer: Lord, protect me from idols that cannot speak truth or guide my life. Let Your Word be my direction.

psalm-115-6.verse:
They have ears, but they cannot hear;
  They have noses, but they cannot smell;
psalm-115-6.prayer: Father, keep me from depending on anything that cannot hear, respond, or save. Teach me to rely on You alone.

psalm-115-7.prayer: Lord, expose every false source of security in my life and lead me back to living faith in You.

psalm-115-8.verse:
Those who make them will become like them,
  Everyone who trusts in them.
psalm-115-8.prayer: Father, help me become more like You, not like the empty things people trust. Shape my heart through worship and obedience.

psalm-115-9.verse:
O Israel, trust in the Lord;
  He is their help and their shield.
psalm-115-9.prayer: Lord, help me trust in You as my help and shield. Keep my confidence rooted in Your protection.

psalm-115-10.verse:
O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord;
  He is their help and their shield.
psalm-115-10.prayer: Father, teach my household and community to trust in You as our help and shield.

psalm-115-11.verse:
You who fear the Lord, trust in the Lord;
  He is their help and their shield.
psalm-115-11.prayer: Lord, let all who fear You trust in You. Strengthen my reverence, confidence, and dependence on Your care.

psalm-115-12.prayer: Father, thank You for remembering Your people. Bless and sustain those who belong to You.

psalm-115-13.verse:
He will bless those who fear the Lord,
  The small together with the great.
psalm-115-13.prayer: Lord, bless those who fear You, both small and great. Let every life find value and care in Your presence.

psalm-115-14.verse:
May the Lord give you increase,
  You and your children.
psalm-115-14.prayer: Father, increase faithfulness, blessing, and spiritual fruit in my life and in the generations after me.

psalm-115-15.verse:
May you be blessed of the Lord,
  Maker of heaven and earth.
psalm-115-15.prayer: Lord, thank You for blessing us as the Maker of heaven and earth. Help me live with gratitude and awe.

psalm-115-16.verse:
The heavens are the heavens of the Lord,
  But the earth He has given to the sons of men.
psalm-115-16.prayer: Father, the heavens belong to You, and the earth has been entrusted to humanity. Help me steward my life faithfully before You.

psalm-115-17.verse:
The dead do not praise the Lord,
  Nor do any who go down into silence;
psalm-115-17.prayer: Lord, remind me to praise You while I have breath. Let my life not waste the days You have given me.

psalm-115-18.verse:
But as for us, we will bless the Lord
  From this time forth and forever.
  Praise the Lord!
psalm-115-18.prayer: Father, help me bless You from this time forth and forever. Let praise remain alive in my heart.

psalm-115-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my help, shield, Creator, and faithful God. Keep my heart from idols, false security, and empty trust. Teach me to give glory to Your name alone, rely on Your protection, and live with gratitude while I have breath. Bless my life, my household, and future generations with faithfulness, reverence, and praise.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
